top3.sql:
SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics'
  AND a.attribute_name = 'durability'
ORDER BY ha.attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics'
  AND a.attribute_name = 'durability'
ORDER BY ha.attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH durability_ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    s.superhero_name,
    ha.attribute_value
  FROM superhero s
  JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
  JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
  JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
  WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics'
    AND a.attribute_name = 'durability'
)
SELECT superhero_name
FROM durability_ranked
ORDER BY attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics'
  AND a.attribute_name = 'durability'
ORDER BY ha.attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH durability_ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    s.superhero_name,
    ha.attribute_value
  FROM superhero s
  JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
  JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
  JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
  WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics'
    AND a.attribute_name = 'durability'
)
SELECT superhero_name
FROM durability_ranked
ORDER BY attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH durability_ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    s.superhero_name,
    CAST(ha.attribute_value AS INTEGER) AS durability_value
  FROM superhero s
  JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
  JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
  JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
  WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics'
    AND a.attribute_name = 'durability'
)
SELECT superhero_name
FROM durability_ranked
ORDER BY durability_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics'
  AND a.attribute_name = 'durability'
ORDER BY ha.attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;
